title: Darcy Umbilical
subtitle: Ground-side and vehicle-side umbilical interface schematic package
role: Schematic design, responsible engineering, and PCB layout design
stackup: Stackup to be added from Altium exports
summary: A Darcy umbilical interface project with separate ground-side and vehicle-side schematic sheets for carrying launch, test, and vehicle interface signals through a controlled connector boundary.
mainConstraints: Clearly separate ground-side and vehicle-side interfaces
Keep umbilical pinout and signal naming auditable
Support test and launch operations through static exported documentation
Avoid depending on raw Altium source files in the portfolio
publicNote: This project is derived from the exported Altium schematic PDF only. Raw .SchDoc and .PcbDoc files are not parsed by this portfolio.

model3d.title: Darcy Umbilical 3D Model
model3d.description: Add an Altium STEP export under content/projects/darcy-umbilical/model to replace the interactive placeholder.

pages.title: Exported Schematic PDF
pages.description: The exported Altium schematic PDF with ground-side and vehicle-side sheets.
